common.legalFootnote: Estimates only — not tax advice. Verify with your CPA.

auth.noAccount: Don't have an account? Sign up
auth.haveAccount: Already have an account? Sign in
auth.signUpSuccess: Account created. If email confirmation is required, check your inbox before signing in.

tos.scrollHint: Scroll to the bottom to enable Accept.

dashboard.title: Dashboard
dashboard.yearFallbackBanner: {{requestedYear}} IRS figures not loaded yet — estimates use {{resolvedYear}} data.
dashboard.noTrucks: No trucks yet. Import a legacy backup or add one in Settings to get started.
dashboard.stateTaxEstimateNote: State tax is a rough estimate for {{state}} — not bracket-accurate.
dashboard.scorpPayrollTitle: S-Corp status requires a payroll provider
dashboard.scorpPayrollNote: W-2 salary and 941/940 filings need a payroll provider and CPA guidance — this app estimates, it does not file.
dashboard.payrollHandledByProvider: Payroll taxes handled by a provider
dashboard.scorpPreviewNote: Educational only — not a filing recommendation. Reasonable salary ($):

deductions.title: Deductions
deductions.outOfPocketSubtitle: Tax deductible — paid by you (business card, personal card, cash)
deductions.outOfPocketEmpty: None yet — import a receipt or invoice.
deductions.withheldSubtitle: Already reflected in net pay, NOT re-deducted (ELD, insurance, truck payment)
deductions.withheldEmpty: None yet — import a settlement PDF.
deductions.personalPaymentNote: 💰 A personal payment method means this was paid with the owner's own money — it will be recorded (or kept in sync) as a Capital Account contribution.

capitalAccount.title: Capital Account
capitalAccount.linkedNote: 🔗 Contributions are linked to a source deduction — tap one, or edit its payment method on the Deductions tab, to change it.
capitalAccount.deleteDrawConfirmBody: Made a typo? This is how to fix it.

importScreen.title: Import
importScreen.pickPrompt: Photograph or upload a settlement, receipt, fuel ticket, or maintenance invoice.
importScreen.duplicateByContent: A {{label}} dated {{date}} for {{amount}} was already saved.
importScreen.duplicateByFilename: A file with this name was already imported before.
importScreen.contributionAdded: 💰 Added as a Capital Account contribution: {{amount}} (paid from personal funds)

camera.permissionNote: Camera access is needed to photograph receipts and settlement PDFs.

importLegacy.title: Import Legacy Backup
importLegacy.pickPrompt: Pick the JSON backup file exported from the web app (Settings → Export Data). Settlements, deductions, maintenance history, Truck Health, Capital Account, loans, cards, and bank/checking statements will be imported. Safe to run more than once — matching records are updated in place, not duplicated.
importLegacy.missingWeekEnding: ⚠ {{missing}} of {{total}} settlement(s) have no weekEnding — will use their document date instead.
importLegacy.healthDataPresent: Truck Health data present — will be applied as baseline overrides.
importLegacy.bizBalancePresent: Business balance present — will update your profile.
importLegacy.truckCreatedNoUnit: Created a truck profile (no unit number in this backup).
importLegacy.truckFailed: Truck profile could not be created — see warnings below.

settings.title: Settings
settings.dataNote: Restore settlements, deductions, maintenance history, and more from a legacy JSON backup.
settings.languageNote: Choose the language for the app's own text. Your data (descriptions, store names) is never translated.
settings.restartRequiredBody: Restart the app to apply the new layout direction.
settings.comingSoonNote: Truck/company profile editing, and a Legal section (Terms + Privacy Policy) land in a later session.

taxEstimator.title: Tax Estimator
taxEstimator.note: Filing-status/state editing, spouse/SEP/health-insurance inputs, and the S-Corp election worksheet land in a later session. The Dashboard's tax cards already reflect your live estimate.

cashFlow.title: Cash Flow
cashFlow.note: Checking account and bank statement views land in a later session.

loans.title: Loans
loans.note: Loan tracking lands in a later session.

maintenance.title: Maintenance
maintenance.note: Maintenance records and per-truck interval editing land in a later session.

truckHealth.title: Truck Health
truckHealth.note: Per-truck, user-editable maintenance intervals and remaining-life tracking land in a later session.

w2.label: W-2 Tax Form
w2.route: Household Income (not yet wired to a screen)

confirmContribution.title: Add as Owner Contribution?
confirmContribution.body: This was paid with {{method}} (personal funds). Record it as a Capital Account contribution?
